en: OF DAVID.Contend, O LORD, with those who contend with me; fight against those who fight against me!
zh: 耶和華啊！與我相爭的，求你與他們相爭； 與我作戰的，求你與他們作戰。

en: Take hold of shield and buckler and rise for my help!
zh: 求你緊握大小的盾牌， 起來幫助我。

en: Draw the spear and javelin against my pursuers! Say to my soul, "I am your salvation!"
zh: 拔出矛槍戰斧， 迎擊那些追趕我的； 求你對我說： “我是你的拯救。”

en: Let them be put to shame and dishonor who seek after my life! Let them be turned back and disappointed who devise evil against me!
zh: 願那些尋索我命的，蒙羞受辱； 願設計陷害我的，退後羞愧。

en: Let them be like chaff before the wind, with the angel of the LORD driving them away!
zh: 願他們像風前的糠秕， 有耶和華的使者驅逐他們。

en: Let their way be dark and slippery, with the angel of the LORD pursuing them!
zh: 願他們的路又暗又滑， 有耶和華的使者追趕他們。

en: For without cause they hid their net for me; without cause they dug a pit for my life.
zh: 因為他們無故為我暗設網羅， 無故挖坑要陷害我的性命。

en: Let destruction come upon him when he does not know it! And let the net that he hid ensnare him; let him fall into it- to his destruction!
zh: 願毀滅在不知不覺間臨到他身上， 願他暗設的網羅纏住自己， 願他落在其中遭毀滅。

en: Then my soul will rejoice in the LORD, exulting in his salvation.
zh: 我的心必因耶和華快樂， 因他的救恩高興。

en: All my bones shall say, "O LORD, who is like you, delivering the poor from him who is too strong for him, the poor and needy from him who robs him?"
zh: 我全身的骨頭都要說： “耶和華啊！有誰像你呢？ 你搭救困苦的人，脫離那些比他強盛的； 搭救困苦和窮乏的人，脫離那些搶奪他的。”

en: Malicious witnesses rise up; they ask me of things that I do not know.
zh: 強暴的見證人起來， 盤問我所不知道的事。

en: They repay me evil for good; my soul is bereft.
zh: 他們對我以惡報善， 使我孤苦無依。

en: But I, when they were sick- I wore sackcloth; I afflicted myself with fasting; I prayed with head bowed on my chest.
zh: 至於我，他們有病的時候， 我就穿上麻衣， 禁食刻苦己心； 我心裡也不住地禱告 。

en: I went about as though I grieved for my friend or my brother; as one who laments his mother, I bowed down in mourning.
zh: 我往來奔走，看他們像自己的朋友兄弟； 我哀痛屈身，如同哀悼母親。

en: But at my stumbling they rejoiced and gathered; they gathered together against me; wretches whom I did not know tore at me without ceasing;
zh: 但我跌倒的時候，他們竟聚集一起歡慶； 我素不相識的聚集一起攻擊我， 他們不住地欺凌我。

en: like profane mockers at a feast, they gnash at me with their teeth.
zh: 他們以最粗鄙的話譏笑我 ， 向我咬牙切齒。

en: How long, O Lord, will you look on? Rescue me from their destruction, my precious life from the lions!
zh: 主啊！你還要看多久？ 求你救我的性命脫離他們的殘害， 救我的生命脫離少壯獅子。

en: I will thank you in the great congregation; in the mighty throng I will praise you.
zh: 我要在大會中稱謝你， 我要在眾民中讚美你。

en: Let not those rejoice over me who are wrongfully my foes, and let not those wink the eye who hate me without cause.
zh: 求你不容那些無理與我為敵的，向我誇耀； 不讓那些無故恨我的，向我擠眼。

en: For they do not speak peace, but against those who are quiet in the land they devise words of deceit.
zh: 因為他們不說和睦的話， 卻計劃詭詐的事， 陷害世上的安靜人。

en: They open wide their mouths against me; they say, "Aha, Aha! our eyes have seen it!"
zh: 他們張大嘴巴攻擊我， 說：“啊哈！啊哈！ 我們親眼看見了。”

en: You have seen, O LORD; be not silent! O Lord, be not far from me!
zh: 耶和華啊！你已經看見了，求你不要緘默； 主啊！求你不要遠離我。

en: Awake and rouse yourself for my vindication, for my cause, my God and my Lord!
zh: 我的 神，我的主啊！ 求你激動醒起，為我伸冤辯護。

en: Vindicate me, O LORD, my God, according to your righteousness, and let them not rejoice over me!
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！求你按著你的公義判斷我， 不容他們向我誇耀。

en: Let them not say in their hearts, "Aha, our heart's desire!" Let them not say, "We have swallowed him up."
zh: 不要讓他們心裡說： “啊哈！這正是我們的心願！” 不要讓他們說：“我們把他吞下去了！”

en: Let them be put to shame and disappointed altogether who rejoice at my calamity! Let them be clothed with shame and dishonor who magnify themselves against me!
zh: 願那些喜歡我遭難的， 一同蒙羞抱愧； 願那些對我妄自尊大的， 都披上慚愧和恥辱。

en: Let those who delight in my righteousness shout for joy and be glad and say evermore, "Great is the LORD, who delights in the welfare of his servant!"
zh: 願那些喜悅我冤屈昭雪的， 都歡呼快樂； 願他們不住地說： “要尊耶和華為大，他喜悅他的僕人平安。”

en: Then my tongue shall tell of your righteousness and of your praise all the day long.
zh: 我的舌頭要述說你的公義， 終日讚美你。
